data_in.description: Candidate JSON project document from user upload

data_out.description: Validation report (JSON) containing pass/fail status and list of schema violation errors (if any)

domain_knowledge: JSON Schema is a declarative language for validating the structure, type, and constraints of JSON documents; a validator checks whether an instance conforms to all constraints in the schema.

Schema validation errors typically include missing required properties, incorrect data types, value constraint violations (e.g., string pattern mismatches, enum violations), and structural inconsistencies.

The paired-omics platform uses a schema to enforce consistent project metadata structure across uploads, ensuring that all projects link MS/MS mass spectra with genome, sample preparation, extraction method, and instrumentation metadata.

direct_checks: Verify schema.json is valid JSON format
Script runs: load a valid test JSON project document and validate it against app/public/schema.json schema without errors
Script runs: load an invalid test JSON project document (missing required fields) and validation reports failure with error message
Output contains structured validation result with pass/fail status and any validation error details
expert_review: Verify schema.json accurately captures all required and optional fields for paired omics project documents as intended by application design
Assess whether validation error messages are sufficiently informative for users to correct malformed JSON uploads

task_description: Validate an uploaded JSON project document against the published JSON Schema (app/public/schema.json) and report validation pass/fail status with any schema violation errors.

task_inputs.label: Candidate JSON project document from user upload

task_objective: Load a candidate JSON project file and validate it against the app/public/schema.json specification, returning pass/fail status with detailed error messages for any schema violations.

task_outputs.label: Validation report with pass/fail status and errors

title: Reproduce the JSON schema validation of uploaded project documents

workflow_description: 1. Load the candidate JSON project file from upload input. 2. Load the JSON Schema definition from app/public/schema.json. 3. Perform schema validation using a JSON Schema validator (e.g. ajv or similar library). 4. Report validation result (pass or fail) and enumerate any constraint violations or missing required fields.
